description: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in Pattaya, Thailand in 1999. Acts as a support club for the Bandidos. Has chapters across Asia, Europe, and Australia. Designated a criminal organization by Finnish authorities.

country_links.evidence_quote: The club was established in Australia in 2014.
country_links.context: The Diablos were established in Australia in 2014 and had a clubhouse in Melton, Melbourne that was raided.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2000, the club expanded to Europe, and chapters in Belgium and Germany were founded.
country_links.context: The Diablos founded a chapter in Belgium.

country_links.evidence_quote: Police conducted a search of the Diablos' clubhouse in Oulu on 18 October 2011 due to a serious criminal suspicion.
country_links.context: The Diablos had a clubhouse in Oulu that was searched by police, and a member committed crimes there.

country_links.evidence_quote: In 2000, the club expanded to Europe, and chapters in Belgium and Germany were founded.
country_links.context: The Diablos founded a chapter in Germany and had a chapter in Heinsberg that was banned.

country_links.evidence_quote: branches in other Asian countries have also been formed, including Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Laos, Singapore and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: The Diablos formed a branch in Indonesia.

country_links.evidence_quote: branches in other Asian countries have also been formed, including Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Laos, Singapore and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: The Diablos formed a branch in Kazakhstan.

country_links.evidence_quote: branches in other Asian countries have also been formed, including Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Laos, Singapore and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: The Diablos formed a branch in Laos.

country_links.evidence_quote: Region served: Australia, Belgium, Finland, Germany, Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Laos, Singapore, Sweden, Thailand, Philippines, UAE and Ukraine
country_links.context: The Diablos Motorcycle Club has a presence in the Philippines as part of its region served.

country_links.evidence_quote: branches in other Asian countries have also been formed, including Indonesia, Kazakhstan, Laos, Singapore and the United Arab Emirates.
country_links.context: The Diablos formed a branch in Singapore.

country_links.evidence_quote: Two members were arrested at the Diablos' clubhouse in Malmö on 22 August 2002 following an assault at a nightclub which left three people injured.
country_links.context: The Diablos had a clubhouse in Malmö where members were arrested and police seized drugs and weapons.

country_links.context: The Diablos Motorcycle Club has a presence in Ukraine as part of its region served.

country_links.context: The Diablos formed a branch in the United Arab Emirates.
